caption: A screen recording displays a web browser window with multiple tabs open, including one titled "Trail & Learning by Syntech". The main view is a dark interface featuring a network diagram with connected circular nodes, some containing small icons. In the upper right, a video call window shows a man with short dark hair in a black shirt, and a separate smaller video feed displays a person in a red top sitting in a room with a guitar. Text such as "play" and "Grant Beddinger" is visible near these video feeds. As the sequence progresses, the man in the video call window briefly disappears and then reappears, while the rest of the interface and the person in the red shirt remain static. A browser search bar at the top contains the text "blackboard aifru learning".
